name: Raspberry-Filled Jelly Doughnuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Place the melted margarine in a small bowl.
3. In another small bowl, combine sugar and cinnamon; set aside.
4. Stir the jelly until smooth.
5. Seal the tip of a large baster with foil. Remove the rubber bulb.
6. Spoon the jelly into the baster; replace the bulb.
7. Bake the biscuits according to the instructions on the can.
8. Immediately dip each hot biscuit in the melted margarine, coating all sides.
9. Roll each biscuit in the sugar mixture, heavily coating all sides.
10. Insert the baster into each biscuit and squeeze a small amount of jelly into the center. Refill the baster as needed.
11. Serve warm or cold.
